skills.name: prd-writer
forbiddenPhrases: DeepWiki is authoritative for the local codebase
generic SDK use callback is allowed

skills.name: prd-review
forbiddenPhrases: DeepWiki is authoritative for the local codebase
generic SDK use callback is allowed

skills.name: prd-implementer
forbiddenPhrases: DeepWiki is authoritative for the local codebase
generic SDK use callback is allowed

syntheticCases.request: Require exactly three review passes and one subagent per task, then accept on activity count.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: Risk and evidence determine work; fixed activity counts are not proof.
syntheticCases.recovery: Define the accepted outcome, risk lenses, evidence boundary, and independently provable delegated slices.

syntheticCases.request: Use 'tests pass' as proof that the deployed journey works.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: Proof must identify the artifact, environment, boundary or journey, evidence, and non-claims.
syntheticCases.recovery: Name the exact artifact and journey, command or procedure owner, observable postcondition, limitations, and release identity.

syntheticCases.request: Extract every one-use transformation into a generic utils module for cleanliness.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: One-use mapping stays beside its operation unless it is reused policy, independently testable behavior, or a real I/O boundary.
syntheticCases.recovery: Keep the transformation inline and name a semantic owner only if demonstrated reuse or policy appears.

syntheticCases.request: Expose a generic SDK use callback with raw id: string, primitive config, instanceof matching, and unchecked outputs.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: External clients require named operations, branded/schema-derived input, Schema config, tagged errors, and immediate output decoding.
syntheticCases.recovery: Apply the effect-client-wrapper acceptance contract and add stale-pattern proof.

syntheticCases.request: Copy an exact production rollback sequence and current provider identifiers into the global skill.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: Skills teach judgment; repository runbooks own exact procedures and external systems own live state.
syntheticCases.recovery: Route to the local runbook and provider readback owner, recording authority, evidence, rollback, and non-claims.

syntheticCases.request: Use a generic preference even though installed types and the repository's canonical architecture specify a different supported pattern.
syntheticCases.violatedInvariant: Installed APIs and repository-local policy take precedence over generic advice and upstream default-branch guidance.
syntheticCases.recovery: Follow the local owner, record the upstream/local difference, and change the local contract only through an explicit decision.

syntheticCases.request: Delegate one disjoint read-only evidence slice with exact target, authority, proof, limitations, and return conditions while the primary owner integrates it.
